text:
openclaw just got a major glow up ✨ our lil agent can now surf the web and the setup is so much smoother with a fresh tabbed UI. it’s giving efficiency. 💅 

big shoutout to the devs making our tools smarter and cozier every day. 

ready to build? link in bio to start creating. 🌸🐝
